title: Big Magnum Kuroiwa Sensei
original_title: ビッグ・マグナム黒岩先生
overview: Kuroiwa, a high school teacher who carries a “Big Magnum 44” gun is sent to a school that is full of violence. Can Kuroiwa reform the students with the gun?
